params.name: The Great Gatsby
params.description: F. Scott Fitzgerald's Jazz Age masterpiece follows enigmatic millionaire Jay Gatsby's obsessive pursuit of lost love Daisy through the eyes of outsider Nick Carraway. It exposes the moral decay beneath 1920s excess—where wealth inflates illusions, love corrodes into status games, and social mobility proves a mirage. This novel now stands as a global literary monument, translated into 42 languages with 30+ million copies sold, its cinematic allure inspiring countless adaptations.
